metadata.title: dtSFM v3 — candidate pools and AlphaFold-3 verification (Paper 1 supplement)

creators.name: Reddy, Sai T.
creators.affiliation: Department of Biosystems Science and Engineering, ETH Zurich; Botnar Institute of Immune Engineering (BIIE), Basel

metadata.description:
Supplementary data for the drug–target specificity foundation model (dtSFM) Paper 1: A drug–target specificity foundation model for off-target prediction, repurposing, and generative design.

This deposit contains the large data artifacts that back the paper's claims but are too large for the GitHub code repository (github.com/Reddy-BIIE-ETHZ/dtSFM): the full library-repurposing rankings, the generative-design candidate cohort with per-design SMILES and AlphaFold-3 structural-confidence profiles, the AlphaFold-3 cofold structures (CIF + summary confidences) for representative complexes, the affinity-calibration cohorts, and the atpE pilot deliverable. Model weights are distributed separately on Hugging Face (SFM-BIIE-ETHZ/dtSFM-v3). All numerical claims are traceable via docs/reproducing_paper_claims.md in the code repository; the closed orthogonal (Codex) audit is in audit/.

The specific molecules disclosed here are dedicated to the public.
metadata.notes: Commercial-use and patent-licensing terms for the dtSFM architecture and training methods are deferred and being arranged with ETH Zürich / BIIE. The molecules in this deposit are dedicated to the public. Contact sai.reddy@ethz.ch.
